task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Solid node with the DEF name 'TERRAIN'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree (usually on the left), look for a node labeled 'DEF TERRAIN Solid'.

task_completion.description: Verify the ElevationGrid dimensions and spacing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Scene Tree, under the TERRAIN node's geometry, the ElevationGrid should show xDimension: 6, zDimension: 6, xSpacing: 2, and zSpacing: 2.

task_completion.description: Verify the height array creates a raised hill in the center.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D viewport, the terrain should visually bulge upwards in the center (max height 0.8). Alternatively, the 'height' field in the Scene Tree should show an array of values peaking at 0.8.

task_completion.description: Verify the terrain has a brown soil appearance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D viewport, the terrain should be colored brown. In the Scene Tree, the Material node should show baseColor set to approximately 0.4 0.3 0.2.

task_completion.description: Verify collision is enabled via a matching ElevationGrid bounding object.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Scene Tree, the 'boundingObject' field of the TERRAIN Solid node should be set to an 'ElevationGrid' rather than 'NULL'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pioneer3at robot is placed at the correct translation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D viewport, a red 4-wheeled Pioneer3at robot should be visible on the terrain. In the Scene Tree, the Pioneer3at node should have its translation set to 1 0 1.

task_completion.description: Verify the world is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots window title bar should display 'terrain_nav_test.wbt', or a terminal/file manager should show the file exists at /home/ga/Desktop/terrain_nav_test.wbt.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Webots GUI to construct or verify the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots application interface (Scene Tree, 3D Viewport) should be visible in the screenshots, showing active interaction.

integrity.description: Verify the 3D scene is actually rendered and not just text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport must show the rendered graphical representation of the terrain and robot, proving the simulation engine is successfully loading the parameters.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just copy-paste the prompt into a text editor to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should not merely show a text editor with the task description or a raw .wbt file without evidence of it working in Webots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/Desktop/terrain_nav_test.wbt. The terrain must be an ElevationGrid with xDimension 6 and zDimension 6. The height array must create a hill with a maximum height of 0.8 (which satisfies the verifier's expected range of 0.5 to 1.2).
